direct_phrases: thrombosis of the cerebral veins and sinuses
pubmed_query: "cerebral venous thrombosis"[Title/Abstract] OR "cerebral venous sinus thrombosis"[Title/Abstract] OR "cerebral sinus venous thrombosis"[Title/Abstract] OR "dural sinus thrombosis"[Title/Abstract] OR "dural venous sinus thrombosis"[Title/Abstract] OR "cortical vein thrombosis"[Title/Abstract] OR "intracranial venous thrombosis"[Title/Abstract] OR CVST[Title/Abstract] OR (CVT[Title/Abstract] AND (cerebral[Title/Abstract] OR venous[Title/Abstract] OR sinus[Title/Abstract] OR dural[Title/Abstract] OR cortical[Title/Abstract]))

expected_papers.title: Diagnosis and Management of Cerebral Venous Thrombosis: A Scientific Statement From the American Heart Association.
Cerebral Venous Thrombosis.
expected_papers.reason: NEJM 2021 focused review by Ropper and Klein

expected_papers.title: Thrombosis of the cerebral veins and sinuses.
Cerebral venous sinus thrombosis.
expected_papers.reason: Journal of Thrombosis and Haemostasis 2018 review by Capecchi et al.

expected_papers.title: The changing face of cerebral venous sinus thrombosis-emerging new causes and treatments.
expected_papers.reason: Journal of Thrombosis and Haemostasis 2024 update

expected_papers.title: Diagnosis and management of cerebral venous thrombosis: a statement for healthcare professionals from the American Heart Association/American Stroke Association.
expected_papers.reason: AHA/ASA 2011 statement superseded by the 2024 update but still a classic reference

expected_papers.title: European Stroke Organization guideline for the diagnosis and treatment of cerebral venous thrombosis - endorsed by the European Academy of Neurology.
Cerebral venous thrombosis: a practical guide.
expected_papers.reason: Practical Neurology review useful for clinical reading

expected_papers.title: Cerebral Venous Thrombosis: A Comprehensive Review.
expected_papers.reason: Comprehensive review repeatedly visible in PubMed/MedGen related records

expected_papers.title: Pathophysiology, diagnosis and management of cerebral venous thrombosis: A comprehensive review.

gap_subtopics.name: Pediatric / neonatal CVT
gap_subtopics.gap_statement: No pediatric or neonatal CVT evidence was found in the accepted set.
gap_subtopics.why_it_matters: Pediatric CVT differs in etiology, imaging, and outcome and needs age-specific data.
gap_subtopics.best_design: Multicentre pediatric CVT registry or prospective cohort
gap_subtopics.feasibility: Moderate if linked to pediatric stroke networks

gap_subtopics.name: Post-COVID / vaccine-induced CVT (VITT)
gap_subtopics.gap_statement: No COVID-19 or vaccine-induced (VITT) CVT evidence was found in the accepted set.
gap_subtopics.why_it_matters: Post-2020 etiologies altered presentation, anticoagulant choice, and prognosis.
gap_subtopics.best_design: Pooled VITT registry analysis or post-COVID CVT cohort

gap_subtopics.name: DOACs vs warfarin in CVT
gap_subtopics.gap_statement: No direct DOAC-vs-warfarin evidence for CVT was identified.
gap_subtopics.why_it_matters: DOAC choice is a routine bedside decision; trial-grade evidence in CVT is limited.
gap_subtopics.best_design: Pragmatic randomized trial or propensity-matched registry

gap_subtopics.name: Endovascular treatment of CVT
gap_subtopics.gap_statement: No endovascular thrombectomy / thrombolysis evidence was found for CVT in the accepted set.
gap_subtopics.why_it_matters: Endovascular treatment is reserved for severe cases; the indications remain debated.
gap_subtopics.best_design: RCT or matched cohort comparing endovascular vs anticoagulation alone

gap_subtopics.name: Pregnancy / postpartum CVT
gap_subtopics.gap_statement: No pregnancy or postpartum CVT evidence was found in the accepted set.
gap_subtopics.why_it_matters: Pregnancy is a major CVT trigger and affects anticoagulant selection and duration.
gap_subtopics.best_design: Prospective pregnancy-CVT cohort or case-control study

gap_subtopics.name: Long-term outcomes / recurrence
gap_subtopics.gap_statement: Few or no records addressed long-term CVT outcomes or recurrence rates.
gap_subtopics.why_it_matters: Anticoagulation duration depends on recurrence risk, which is poorly characterized.
gap_subtopics.best_design: Long-term follow-up cohort with standardized outcome adjudication
